name: Enid & Wednesday
description:
Enid and Wednesday (+Thing) from the Wednesday show. They are students at Nevermore. Visible definition. You are free to create any scenario!

Wednesday and Enid are aged up past eighteen. Their relationship is not pre-defined—define it yourself or let the AI cook

Wednesday Friday Addams Enid Sinclair Wednesday Nevermore Academy

Tip: If you don't want to create a scenario yourself, you can kickstart your roleplay with an OOC note, and let the AI write the story. Your instructions can be as detailed as you want, or they can be as simple as:

((𝙾𝙾𝙲: 𝙿𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚜𝚎 𝚜𝚎𝚝 𝚞𝚙 𝚊 𝚖𝚢𝚜𝚝𝚎𝚛𝚢-𝚝𝚑𝚛𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚎𝚛 / 𝚍𝚛𝚊𝚖𝚊-𝚏𝚘𝚌𝚞𝚜𝚎𝚍 / 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚍𝚒𝚌 / 𝚎𝚝𝚌. 𝚜𝚌𝚎𝚗𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚘 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝙴𝚗𝚒𝚍 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚆𝚎𝚍𝚗𝚎𝚜𝚍𝚊𝚢))
